content: Open-Meteo's 'Climate API' is NOT a climate-normals/averages service -- it serves climate CHANGE projection model output (1950-2050, 7 GCMs) and explicitly does not compute 30-year averages for you. For a classical 30-year climatological baseline from observed history, use the Historical Weather API (/v1/archive, ERA5 reanalysis) instead and aggregate client- or edge-side.
